title: How the Right Infrastructure Unlocks Better AML Engine Performance
summary: Many anti-money laundering (AML) engines underperform or generate excessive false positives because of the scale and complexity of modern financial data. These unsatisfactory results are typically not due to flawed detection logic but rather to insufficient supporting infrastructure. A variety of infrastructure limitations, such as weak data pipelines, limited compute...
